title: AWS CloudFormation Stack Resource
description: Represents a resource within an AWS CloudFormation stack. Each resource corresponds to a physical AWS service resource (such as an EC2 instance, S3 bucket, or Lambda function) that is provisioned and managed as part of the stack lifecycle.

StackName.description: The name of the stack the resource belongs to.

LogicalResourceId.description: The logical name of the resource as specified in the template.

PhysicalResourceId.description: The name or unique identifier that corresponds to a physical instance ID of the resource.

ResourceType.description: The type of the resource (e.g. AWS::EC2::Instance, AWS::S3::Bucket).

Timestamp.description: The time the status was updated.

ResourceStatusReason.description: Success or failure message associated with the resource.

Description.description: User-defined description associated with the resource.

StackResourceDriftInformation.description: Summarizes information about whether the resource's actual configuration differs from its expected configuration.

StackResourceDriftStatus.description: Status of the resource's actual configuration compared to its expected configuration.

LastCheckTimestamp.description: When CloudFormation last checked if the resource had drifted from its expected configuration.

ModuleInfo.description: Contains information about the module from which the resource was created, if the resource was created from a module included in the stack template.

TypeHierarchy.description: A concatenated list of the module type or types containing the resource.

LogicalIdHierarchy.description: A concatenated list of the logical IDs of the module or modules containing the resource.
